headline: Copart Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher ASPs, Mix Shift
summary: CPRT beats Q3 estimates as higher selling prices and a richer revenue mix offset lower unit volumes and softer insurance activity.

raw.headline: Copart Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates on Higher ASPs, Mix Shift
raw.summary: CPRT beats Q3 estimates as higher selling prices and a richer revenue mix offset lower unit volumes and softer insurance activity.

headline: Easing Bond Yields Lift US Equity Futures Pre-Bell Amid Ongoing Middle East Peace Talks
summary: US equity futures were higher pre-bell Friday as traders mulled easing bond yields and monitored dev

headline: Copart Inc (CPRT) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Revenue Growth and Strategic Investments ...
summary: Copart Inc (CPRT) reports a 2.1% increase in consolidated revenue and strategic investments in technology, despite facing challenges in unit sales and rising fuel costs.
